mapper.select:
SELECT si.id, si.CODE, si.NAME, si.staff_sex, si.images, si.create_date, si.birth_date, si.content, si.email, si.phone, si.sys_user_id, si.del_flag, si.tag_id,
si.professional_score, si.communication_score, si.teamwork_score, si.emergency_score, si.learning_score,
ti.name AS tagName FROM staff_info si LEFT JOIN tag_info ti ON (ti.id = si.tag_id) WHERE 1 = 1 AND si.del_flag = 0
AND si.CODE like CONCAT("%",#{queryForm.code},"%")
AND si.name like CONCAT("%",#{queryForm.name},"%")
AND ti.name like CONCAT("%",#{queryForm.tagName},"%")
ORDER BY si.create_date DESC

SELECT si.id, si.CODE, si.NAME, si.staff_sex, si.images, si.create_date, si.birth_date, si.content, si.email, si.phone, si.sys_user_id, si.del_flag, si.tag_id,
si.professional_score, si.communication_score, si.teamwork_score, si.emergency_score, si.learning_score,
ti.name AS tagName FROM staff_info si LEFT JOIN tag_info ti ON (ti.id = si.tag_id) WHERE 1 = 1 AND si.del_flag = 0
AND si.CODE like CONCAT("%",#{queryForm.code},"%")
AND si.name like CONCAT("%",#{queryForm.name},"%")
AND ti.name like CONCAT("%",#{queryForm.tagName},"%")
ORDER BY si.create_date DESC
